document_metadata.title: LinkedIn Hiring Value Review
document_metadata.scope: Global data for Guidewire Software, no subsidiary data included
document_metadata.confidentiality: For internal, non-commercial use only. Provided under license from LinkedIn and subject to the LinkedIn Subscription Agreement and Service Terms.

executive_summary.headline: LinkedIn continues to deliver the technical talent, efficiency gains, and brand influence that support Guidewire's FY26 product and cloud strategy.
executive_summary.context: Guidewire enters FY26 with strong market momentum, expanding cloud adoption, launching new AI-powered applications, and broadening its global customer base.

key_themes.theme: LinkedIn is fueling stronger technical hiring aligned to Guidewire's cloud & AI roadmap
points: Influenced hires carry 1.8x deeper skill density, concentrated in engineering, cloud, data, and Guidewire-specific skills
Skills needed for PricingCenter, UnderwritingCenter, generative AI, and cloud platform innovation
67.3% of all hires are LinkedIn-influenced, matching top performers

key_themes.theme: LinkedIn is strengthening hiring efficiency through AI-assisted recruiter workflows
points: AI-Assisted Search and messaging increasing candidate engagement quality

key_themes.theme: LinkedIn's brand and jobs ecosystem is driving significant market demand and funnel momentum
points: Candidates exposed to brand are 1.7x more likely to accept InMails
Candidates exposed to brand are 5.9x more likely to convert to hires

executive_summary.conclusion: By strengthening early-funnel visibility and scaling adoption of AI-driven workflows, Guidewire can fully capitalize on this momentum - ensuring its hiring engine is as innovative, agile, and future-ready as the platform it is bringing to market.

inmail_acceptance_rate.note: Listed as yoy_diff +41% for Guidewire and -27% for peer in the raw data

job_views.note: Page states +36% YoY growth in views in exec summary

overview_metrics.overall_narrative: Job-market demand and discovery are growing strongly, candidates who discover Guidewire continue to convert at strong absolute volumes.

awareness_actions.description: Share of voice in the market - do prospective hires know about your organization?

hiring_funnel.narrative: Guidewire's hiring funnel is strong in the mid-funnel, but early-funnel conversion is where we need to increase the number of qualified candidates reaching recruiters.

influenced_hires.narrative: Guidewire continues to rely heavily on influenced hiring - and this remains a real strength!
influenced_hires.note: Influenced hires numbers shown may differ from in-product reporting due to different methodologies and data sources

skill_density.description: Influenced hires had 1.8X the number of skills compared to non-influenced hires

quality_of_hire.narrative: 499 Influenced Hires in the L12M bring significantly deeper technical capability - the exact skills Guidewire needs for its cloud, AI, and product expansion.

uplift.description: Recruiters using AI-Assisted Messages see 24% higher acceptance rates (Customer data)
Recruiters using AI-Assisted Search experience an +18% higher InMail acceptance rate compared to search sessions using manual filters (LinkedIn-wide stat)

ai_assisted_search.narrative: Many on your team are starting to adopt AI-Assisted Searches - globally, those who do, see +18% uplift in InMail acceptance rates.

inmail_acceptance_by_brand_exposure.description: Higher Acceptance Rate for Engaged members
inmail_acceptance_by_brand_exposure.engaged_definition: Receiving media impression, interacting with the 'I'm Interested' button, viewing jobs, or visiting career/company page (Jobs tab & Life Tab) within 30 days of receiving an InMail

brand_to_hire_conversion.description: Higher likelihood of those who engaged with your employer brand becoming a hire
brand_to_hire_conversion.engaged_definition: Members who received Traffic Driver Ad / Work With Us (WWU) impression, visited Jobs or Life tabs, or interacted with the 'I'm Interested' button within 30 days leading up to clicking on job apply

career_page_engagement.note: Viewers demographics are measured across Jobs tab & Life tab views and are not deduplicated for repeated viewers

quality_outcomes_of_eb_influenced_hires.note: Compared to non-influenced hires, your Employer Brand Influenced Hires are...
quality_outcomes_of_eb_influenced_hires.definition: An employer brand influenced hire is any hire who interacted with the customer's Career page (Jobs & Life tab), or clicked on a Traffic Driver / WWU / Company Discovery ad or clicked on the I'm interested button within 12 months of getting hired.
quality_outcomes_of_eb_influenced_hires.data_period: Talent hired over the last 24 months who have had at least 1 full year of service or already had an outcome (early loss). Aggregated at the ultimate parent company level.

demand.description: Percentage calculated based on InMails received
demand.label: In higher demand - more highly sought after
demand.note: 0.7x means EB-influenced hires are slightly less in demand (receiving fewer InMails), which could mean they are more specialized/niche

seniority.label: More experienced - more manager and above influenced hires

employee_retention.description: % New Hires that stay for at least 1 year
employee_retention.label: Stay longer - more make it through the first year

promotion.description: % of Hires that take a 2nd role at the company after initial hire
promotion.label: Promoted faster - higher promotion rate

learning_resources: Weekly Live Webinars in the Learning Center (available across 16 languages)
Talent Community for peer learning and on-demand resources
Help Center with AI-powered help assistant
Learning Center with product updates, webinars, expert Q&As

ai_assisted_follow_ups.description: Automate follow-ups at scale without losing the personal touch. AI-Assisted Follow-Ups instantly draft personalized messages leveraging each candidate's profile and prior InMail interactions.

ai_assisted_search_profile_highlights.description: With profile highlighting in AI-Assisted Search, you can quickly understand which qualifications are met and where gaps exist for potential candidates.

hiring_enterprise_program.description: The premier hiring solution for talent professionals seeking adaptability, efficiency and impact.
hiring_enterprise_program.value_proposition: HEP unlocks value by increasing productivity, amplifying reach and engagement with quality candidates and maximizing hiring investment.

three_pillars.description: Improve applicant quality with robust, AI-powered updates to our Jobs product

three_pillars.pillar: Find and connect with top talent fast
three_pillars.description: Built on the world's most dynamic talent network, uncover and engage with top talent at scale

three_pillars.pillar: Streamline hiring across your tech stack
three_pillars.description: Seamlessly hire with integrations connecting to tools you already use

future: Hiring Assistant Integration for Microsoft Teams

applicant_targeting.description: AI-powered Applicant Targeting to help your teams reach candidates with precision. Leveraging the job description, it will automatically generate targeting criteria, ensuring your job is surfaced to the right candidates.

featured_jobs.description: Gain greater visibility on urgent or high-priority roles with Featured Jobs. With a 14-day boost and a 'Featured' label, it will signal urgency to job seekers.

ai_assisted_follow_ups.description: Generate tailored follow-up messages by analyzing candidate profiles and past interactions, helping your teams proactively check back in with top talent.

ats_connected_projects.description: Evaluate every applicant for a given job - whether they applied on or off LinkedIn - through Recruiter System Connect's latest enhancement.
ats_connected_projects.benefit: Connect for smarter, faster applicant evaluations

microsoft_teams_integration.description: Share candidates from LinkedIn Recruiter to Microsoft Teams. Hiring managers can review, discuss, and provide feedback and it will instantly populate in Recruiter.
microsoft_teams_integration.benefit: Candidate feedback, all in one platform

testimonial.quote: LinkedIn's Hiring Assistant isn't just an AI tool - it's a strategic partner and companion in our hiring process. It shows how AI can empower recruiters to do what they do best - connect the right people to the right opportunities.
testimonial.author: Lucy McGhee
testimonial.title: Talent Acquisition Lead Victoria and South Australia at Aurecon

strengths: 67.3% influenced hire rate - strong reliance on LinkedIn ecosystem
1.8x deeper skill density in influenced hires
Mid-funnel conversion (12.5%) significantly above peer benchmark (9.6%)
83% AI-Assisted InMail adoption, ahead of peers (81%)
24% higher acceptance rates from AI-Assisted InMails
1.7x higher InMail acceptance from brand-engaged candidates
5.9x higher likelihood of brand-engaged candidates becoming hires
Strong technical skill alignment (SQL, Java, Guidewire, Python, JavaScript)
improvement_areas: Early-funnel conversion (6.1% vs 8.8% peer benchmark) needs improvement
AI-Assisted Search adoption (79%) slightly behind peers (81%)
Active recruiter seats decreased from 101 to 81 (-13%)
Move more recruiters from moderate to high AI search adoption
strategic_recommendations: Strengthen early-funnel visibility to increase qualified candidates reaching recruiters
Scale adoption of AI-driven workflows across the team
Leverage AI champions (Avinash Kumar, Mayur Solanki, Harish Reddy) to inspire broader adoption
Increase employer brand investment to boost company page views
Expand AI-Assisted Search usage (currently 30% of searches vs 19% peers, but adoption rate lower)

yoy_comparison_table.note: Complete YoY difference data extracted from overview page
